case.instruction: Turn the current slide into a leadership-ready page. Use a conclusion-style title that highlights growth, convert the financial data into a bar chart, convert the product line differences into a comparison table, and add two crisp action recommendations.

items.text: Revenue grew 32 percent year over year and enterprise plans led growth.
Q1 revenue was 380M RMB and Q2 revenue was 470M RMB.
Copilot Pro, Knowledge Hub, and Meeting Bot showed different retention patterns.
We should expand enterprise sales and improve Meeting Bot conversion.

case.original_text:
1. Executive summary
Total revenue in H1 2026 reached 850M RMB, up 32 percent year over year, with a 56 percent gross margin and subscription revenue accounting for 68 percent.

2. Financial data
Q1 revenue was 380M RMB and Q2 revenue was 470M RMB. Enterprise ARR reached 260M RMB while SMB ARR reached 140M RMB.

3. Product lines
Copilot Pro serves engineering teams with a 91 percent renewal rate. Knowledge Hub serves operations teams with an 84 percent renewal rate. Meeting Bot serves sales teams with a 27 percent trial to paid conversion rate.

4. Management actions
Focus on enterprise expansion, improve Meeting Bot conversion, and strengthen cross product selling.

item_texts_after: Revenue grew 32 percent year over year and enterprise plans led growth.
Q1 revenue was 380M RMB and Q2 revenue was 470M RMB.
Copilot Pro, Knowledge Hub, and Meeting Bot showed different retention patterns.
We should expand enterprise sales and improve Meeting Bot conversion.

commands.source_text: We should expand enterprise sales and improve Meeting Bot conversion.

render_params.title: 下半年核心行动建议
render_params.text:
1. 聚焦企业市场拓展：加大企业版销售投入，深化行业解决方案，目标实现企业客户数增长50%以上。
2. 优化Meeting Bot产品体验：重新设计用户引导流程，提升首次使用转化率，目标将次月留存率提升至行业平均水平。
